overall.description: A static view of a medieval great hall interior from a video game, featuring high vaulted wooden ceilings, stone walls, long dining tables with benches, and sparse NPCs seated at tables. The scene showcases detailed Gothic architecture with mixed natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with dining tables and vaulted ceiling

agents.ego_description: standing still in the great hall observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: seated at wooden bench near table, appearing to eat or rest

entered.detail: high arched wooden ceiling with exposed dark timber beams and rafters
grey stone block wall with wooden paneling and mounted decorations
grey stone block wall with wooden shelving and artifacts
long rectangular wooden dining table with place settings
simple wooden bench seats paired with the dining tables
long blue decorative rug running down the central aisle
large stone fireplace with dark opening on the left wall
ornate iron chandelier with multiple candles suspended from ceiling beams
tall gothic arched windows at the far end letting in bright natural light
framed portrait paintings hanging on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a grand medieval great hall with Gothic architecture. High vaulted wooden ceilings dominate overhead while long dining tables with benches line the space. A few NPCs are seated at tables on the right side. Natural light streams through large arched windows at the far end, mixing with interior candlelight to create a serene, atmospheric environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze within a grand medieval great hall, capturing the stillness of its Gothic architecture. It begins by framing the vast interior, where high vaulted wooden ceilings loom over long dining tables and benches. As the eye settles on the space, the presence of a few NPCs seated to the right adds a touch of life to the quiet hall. The scene then emphasizes the interplay of light, as natural rays streaming through distant arched windows blend with the soft glow of interior candlelight to complete the serene environment.
